title: Ubiquiti sector antenna AirMax AC 21dBi 5GHz, 60 °
description: AM-5AC21-60 is the airMAX ac sector antenna with 21dBi antenna gain, 60 ° of beam angle and has highly resistant to noise interference in co-location deployments. The innovative deflector design , together with the reduced sidelobes and backlobes, reject interference from other transmitters in the area â potentially on the same tower Improved Signal-to-Noise Ratio (S/N or SNR) allows a higher-order modulation to be used, for example, 256QAM rather than 16QAM . This increases the number of bits per second for a fixed bandwidth (or data rate) The airMAX ac Sector Antennas are engineered to reject interference and provide enhanced scalability, higher gain, and superior beam performance in PtMP networks airMAX ® ac Antennas are designed with robust mechanical design for outdoor application use Every airMAX ® ac Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount, so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation Antenna Protective shroud (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
